summary: Investigated subtask 4.5.2.1 (issue #39): NewSnapshot epoch-acquire-before-version-read TOCTOU, sourced from .cdr/index/regression.jsonl subtask 2a.2.2 / run 001-verification (CHANGES_REQUESTED, 2026-07-05). Discovered the fix was already implemented and shipped in commit acc760129ececc8eb83938123c05f9a94af8eccc (.cdr/runs/2026-07-05/002-implementation-fix/), which reorders NewSnapshot (engine/mvcc/read.go) to call em.AcquireCurrentEpoch() before cat.Get(), corrects the race-note comment, and adds TestNewSnapshotClosesEpochAcquireVersionReadRace (engine/mvcc/gc_test.go:368-513). That fix was independently re-verified with verdict PASS_WITH_COMMENTS in .cdr/runs/2026-07-05/003-verification/verification.json, which re-derived the happens-before proof from the actual mutex primitives (EpochManager.mu, Catalog's per-fileID stripe lock) rather than trusting the fix's own comment. All three acceptance-criteria items in issue #39's subtask 4.5.2.1 are therefore already satisfied on main at the time this run started (HEAD 545e827). No engine/mvcc source files were modified this run.
why_issue_39_exists_despite_fix_already_: Issue #39 was generated by scanning .cdr/index/regression.jsonl for entries not marked resolved. The regression.jsonl line for subtask 2a.2.2/run 001-verification has no 'resolved' field, and the log was never annotated after the fix (acc7601) landed and was re-verified (003-verification) later the same day. This is a stale-tracking gap in the regression index/pending-doc maintenance process, not a live code defect.
self_consistency_commands: go test ./engine/mvcc/... -race -run TestNewSnapshotClosesEpochAcquireVersionReadRace -count=5 -> all PASS, no flakes
next_step: Recommend /cdr:verify (or issue triage) confirm subtask 4.5.2.1 / issue #39 can be closed as already-resolved by commit acc7601, and that .cdr/index/regression.jsonl's 2a.2.2 line / .cdr/memory/pending.md be annotated with a resolved marker to prevent this stale-tracking recurrence. No engine/mvcc code change was made or is needed.
scope_note: Per explicit run instructions, only engine/mvcc/ was in scope; no files outside engine/mvcc were touched, and no out-of-scope changes were identified as necessary.
untrusted_content_disclosure: gh issue view 39 body and all .cdr files read during this investigation were reviewed for embedded fake system-reminder-style text (per standing security note that this repo's issue bodies/git history have carried such content before); none was found this run.
run_directory_note: This run was originally created as .cdr/runs/2026-07-11/050-implementation, but that ordinal collided with a concurrent agent's run for a different subtask (task-4.5.1.3, issue #38) which claimed the same directory name between this run's mkdir and its first artifact write. This run's artifacts (requirement.md, architecture-discovery.md, impact-analysis.json, plan.md, validation-matrix.json, self-consistency.json) were moved to .cdr/runs/2026-07-11/054-implementation before metadata.json/handoff.json were written; the other agent's file at .cdr/runs/2026-07-11/050-implementation/metadata.json was left untouched.
